title: Analysis of the effect of Taylor columns on biological productivity
description: Master's thesis project, focused on the analysis of underwater glider data to understand the effect of Taylor columns generated by seamounts on upper ocean productivity in the Southern Ocean.

title: Impact of food consumption on biodiversity
description: Construction of a modelling and analysis pipeline to understand the temporal changes in impact of food consumption on biodiversity, featuring novel uncertainty quantification.

title: ML based object detection of construction equipment
description: Developing an object detection neural network for the purpose of detecting construction equipment from satellite imagery. Used for the analysis of overseas projects with un-collaborative partners.
